purpose: A multi-line text input for free-form content. Supports auto-grow, character counting, and value state validation.
whenToUse: When user input may exceed one line
For long-form input in dialogs and forms
whenNotToUse: For rich text — use rich text editor
doRules: Use for multi-line free text (comments, descriptions)
Set rows to indicate expected length
Show character counter when maxLength applies
Enable growing=true to expand as user types
dontRules: Do not use for single-line input — use Input
Do not set maxLength below realistic length

layoutGuidance.sizing: Width fills container; height by rows.

accessibilityGuidance.requirement: Enter creates newline; Tab moves focus
Character count announced when maxLength set
